activationConditions: VPS WorkRouter bootstrap check passes
observe-loop emits heartbeat and AgentRunEvidenceV1 locally
live transports remain disabled
entries.rationale: This is the only new near-term agent lane: observe pending work and export local outbox envelopes on the existing VPS.

activationConditions: test catalog consistency checks pass
gate summary artifacts are stable
agent output remains recommendation-only
entries.rationale: A test monitor can speed operator awareness without executing fixes or mutating repo state.

activationConditions: evidence promotion command contract is stable
mutable runtime outputs remain local unless explicitly promoted
curator can propose evidence bundles without writing governed records automatically
entries.rationale: Evidence drift is a near-term risk; a curator should propose promotion targets, not promote silently.

activationConditions: Space binding is explicit in AgentProfileV1
workflow/proposal surfaces are stable
Space structure changes route through proposals or steward gates
entries.rationale: Space agents are valuable later, but they must draft structures and workflows through governed Space surfaces before mutation authority exists.

activationConditions: workflow artifact pipeline is stable
closeout ledgers are canonical for follow-through
agent can propose workflow drafts without applying them
entries.rationale: This agent should reduce dropped follow-through only after workflow authority contracts are stable.

activationConditions: operator-only runtime topology redaction is enforced
health summaries can be emitted without provider inventory exposure
VPS authority validation passes
entries.rationale: Runtime health visibility is useful, but it must not leak operator-only topology or become runtime mutation authority.

activationConditions: isolated request worktree enforcement exists
allowed write scopes are machine-validated
verification gates are mandatory
human approval is required per request
entries.rationale: D2 patch preparation should remain future-gated and separate from messenger routing until isolated implementation controls are governed.
